title: Do declassified files support Trump's election security claims?
description: BBC Verify has reviewed these documents, although some of them have been heavily redacted.
content:
In a 26-minute speech from the White House, President Donald Trump revived some familiar claims about US election fraud and interference.

title: Brenda Fricker, Oscar winner for My Left Foot, dies aged 81
description: The acclaimed Irish actor started her career in Coronation Street and Casualty before a string of high-profile Hollywood roles
content: Brenda Fricker, who became the first female Irish Oscar winner for acting with My Left Foot, has died aged 81. Her agent Phil Belfield told the BBC in a statement: “We will never see her like again and the world is lesser for the lack of her … I was ... [1548 chars]

title: EU proposes slowing down cuts to carbon emissions for businesses
description: Under the proposals, the EU plans to relax its emissions trading system to give companies more time to reduce their carbon output.
content:
The European Union has unveiled proposals that would slow cuts to businesses' greenhouse gas emissions limits, as part of a major climate policy overhaul.
The reforms would relax the rules of the bloc's emissions trading system (ETS) to give business... [2518 chars]

title: 'Send help rather than complain,' Canada's Ford tells US as wildfire smoke blankets parts of North America
description: Thick pollution has made the air stretching from Winnipeg to the southern US unhealthy to breathe and officials are encouraging people to stay indoors.
content:
How to stay safe in the smoke
If you’re in an area impacted by wildfire smoke today, here are some tips on how to reduce health risks:
Stay inside as much as possible, with windows closed
Avoid strenuous outdoor activities

title: Motorola issues an official statement on the Edge 70 Max's software update policy
description: It's thankfully the best version of the two separate promises it made. Following up on our editorial regarding its incredibly confusing software support...
content:
